title: N+1 fix through parent-level preload consolidation
prompt: Given `MyApp.Accounts.get_user_with_stats/1` that currently runs: `Repo.get(User, id)`, then `length(Repo.all(from p in Post, where: p.user_id == ^id))`, then `length(Repo.all(from c in Comment, where: c.user_id == ^id))`. Rewrite it to a single query with subqueries returning `{user, post_count, comment_count}` — NO multi-round-trip. Use two aggregate subqueries and join/select. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires consolidating 3 round-trips into 1. Multiple pattern synthesis.
